# ColAndreas used by Mrucznik RP

This directory is a source snapshot of
[`MrucznikRolePlay/ColAndreas`](https://github.com/MrucznikRolePlay/ColAndreas)
at tag `v1.5.1`, commit `10447436f9fd22000192b34ad5ffbf582e431c46`.

It is kept in-tree because this exact fork does not publish a Windows DLL. The
Windows x86 artifact is produced by `.github/workflows/build-colandreas.yml` and
is passed to `mta/setup.ps1`. No gameplay changes are applied to the snapshot.

The upstream license is in `License.txt`.
